name: part_004
file: tmp_【重大告知あり】新３Dお披露目？！癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026🎂 【ホロライブ⧸癒月ちょこ】 [_1PGuuEP7ps]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_004.mov

scenes.description: Performance of the song 'Summer Chocolate' by Yuzuki Choco and Yukihana Lamy.
Interlude after the first song and character reveal for Shirogane Noel.
Performance of a Reggaeton-style cover of 'Koi Suru Fortune Cookie' by Yuzuki Choco and Shirogane Noel.

subtitles.original: サマーチョコレート
subtitles.english: Summer Chocolate

subtitles.original: ゆるゆるに解けるテンパリングが大事
subtitles.english: It's important to temper it so it melts smoothly.

subtitles.original: 熱すぎても飽きちゃって冷たいのはダメよ多分
subtitles.english: Too hot and I'll lose interest, and cold is probably no good either.

subtitles.original: チョコみたいな私をプレシャスに扱ってみて
subtitles.english: Try treating me, just like chocolate, as something precious.

subtitles.original: 炭酸のお酒でシュワシュワシュワ
subtitles.english: Fizzy, fizzy with carbonated drinks.

subtitles.original: 愛は伝えなきゃ届かない 恋してるチョコみたいでした
subtitles.english: Love won't reach if you don't express it; I'm in love, and it's just like chocolate.

subtitles.original: チュッとして
subtitles.english: Give it a kiss.

subtitles.original: 夜空のグラスにキラキラこぼして
subtitles.english: Spilling sparkles into a glass of the night sky.

subtitles.original: 息もできないくらいにほら立ってだって恋に溺れて
subtitles.english: Look, I'm so deep in love I can barely breathe.

subtitles.original: 君の熱で溶けたらそのまま食べてよ
subtitles.english: Once I melt from your warmth, eat me right then and there.

subtitles.original: 手にベトベトついちゃって 一生一緒
subtitles.english: Getting all sticky on your hands, let's be together for a lifetime.

subtitles.original: 甘濃いお酒ほろ酔い ウインクでストロング
subtitles.english: Sweet, rich alcohol, a bit tipsy, making it "Strong" with a wink.

subtitles.original: リキュールじゃもう酔えない ラブで尽くして お願い
subtitles.english: I can't get drunk on just liqueur anymore; please, serve me with love.

subtitles.original: お砂糖マシマシで飲みやすさとかいらない
subtitles.english: Extra helpings of sugar; I don't care about it being easy to drink.

subtitles.original: 灼熱でさ溶かして ごくって飲んで
subtitles.english: Melt it with scorching heat and gulp it down.

subtitles.original: 癖のある私だからさ 君が選ばれたサマーチョコレート
subtitles.english: Since I'm quite the handful, you're the one chosen for this Summer Chocolate.

subtitles.original: ドロドロトロりベイベー 溶けちゃってキャッチミーダーリン
subtitles.english: Melting and gooey, baby; I'm melting away, so catch me, darling.

subtitles.original: ピュアピュアココアふわり ゆるゆるワンツー！
subtitles.english: Soft, pure cocoa; loosely, one, two!

subtitles.original: What's up Japan! Can you hear me? It's Reggaeton style!
subtitles.english: What's up Japan! Can you hear me? It's Reggaeton style!

subtitles.original: No money, no job, too much problems! We have no reason to be sad! It's time to get up!
subtitles.english: No money, no job, too much problems! We have no reason to be sad! It's time to get up!

subtitles.original: We have a hot new song! That's from AKB48!
subtitles.english: We have a hot new song! That's from AKB48!

subtitles.original: To make you feel good! Fortune Cookie! So dance Japan crazy!
subtitles.english: To make you feel good! Fortune Cookie! So dance Japan crazy!

subtitles.original: 恋するフォーチュンクッキー
subtitles.english: Fortune Cookie in Love

subtitles.original: 作詞：秋元 康 / 作曲：伊藤心太郎
subtitles.english: Lyrics: Yasushi Akimoto / Composition: Shintaro Ito

subtitles.original: あなたのことが好きなのに
subtitles.english: Even though I'm in love with you,

subtitles.original: 私にまるで興味ない
subtitles.english: You don't seem to have any interest in me at all.

subtitles.original: 何度目かの失恋の準備 Yeah Yeah Yeah
subtitles.english: Getting ready for yet another heartbreak, yeah, yeah, yeah.

subtitles.original: まわりを見れば大勢の
subtitles.english: Looking around, I see so many

subtitles.original: 可愛いコたちがいるんだもん
subtitles.english: Other cute girls everywhere.

subtitles.original: 地味な花は気づいてくれない Yeah Yeah Yeah
subtitles.english: You never notice a plain little flower like me, yeah, yeah, yeah.

subtitles.original: カフェテリアに流れるMusic ぼんやり聴いていたら
subtitles.english: While listening aimlessly to the music in the cafeteria,

subtitles.original: 知らぬ間にリズムに合わせ つま先から動き出す
subtitles.english: Before I know it, I'm moving to the rhythm, starting from my toes.

subtitles.original: 止められない今の気持ち
subtitles.english: I can't hold back these feelings anymore.

subtitles.original: カモン カモン カモン カモン ベイビー 占ってよ
subtitles.english: Come on, come on, come on, come on, baby, tell my fortune!

subtitles.original: 恋するフォーチュンクッキー
subtitles.english: The Fortune Cookie in Love!

subtitles.original: 未来はそんな悪くないよ
subtitles.english: The future isn't looking all that bad.

subtitles.original: Hey Hey Hey
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, hey.

subtitles.original: ツキを呼ぶには笑顔を見せること
subtitles.english: To bring good luck your way, you've got to show a smile.

subtitles.original: ハートのフォーチュンクッキー
subtitles.english: A Fortune Cookie for the heart!

subtitles.original: 運勢 今日よりも良くしよう
subtitles.english: Let's make our luck even better than it is today.

subtitles.original: Hey Hey Hey Hey Hey Hey
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey.

subtitles.original: 人生捨てたもんじゃないよね あっと驚く奇跡が起きる
subtitles.english: Life isn't so bad after all, is it? A miracle that'll blow you away is going to happen.

subtitles.original: あなたとどこかで愛し合える予感
subtitles.english: I have a feeling that somewhere, we'll fall in love.
